subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-08
subcodes.first_line: I have taken 4,600 steps.  This is the distance between the city of 'Akka and the Shrine of Baha'u'llah. I wish to practise walking
subcodes.first_line_orig: چهار هزار و ششصد قدم راه رفتم بطول راه عکّل تا روضهٴ مبارکه میخواهم مشق راه رفتن کنم
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @Shrines and Holy places
